new: 气温一直在下降。
reason: Near-duplicate of sentence_1 ('飞机开始下降了'). New sentence uses a different subject to illustrate 下降.

old: 这条鱼很鲜，刚从海里捞上来的。
new: 这条鱼很鲜，刚买回来的。
reason: 捞 (to fish out) is not in vocab_upto_L4. Replaced with 买回来.

old: This fish is very fresh, just caught from the sea.
new: This fish is very fresh, just bought.
reason: Translation must match revised sentence_2.

new: 这朵花的味道很香。
reason: 香皂 (soap) is not in vocab_upto_L4.

old: Soap has a very fragrant smell.
new: This flower has a very fragrant smell.
reason: Translation must match revised sentence_3.

new: 他吃得很香。
reason: 睡得很香 means 'sleep soundly', not 'eat with relish'. Wrong definition illustrated. The definition is 'with relish' (of eating/doing something enjoyably).

old: The child is sleeping with relish (soundly).
new: He ate with great relish.
reason: Translation must match revised sentence_2.

new: 她的心很健康。
reason: 心跳 is not in vocab_upto_L4. Reordered: use existing sentence_3 content for sentence_1.

old: My heart is beating very fast.
new: Her heart is very healthy.
reason: Translation must match revised sentence_1.

new: 我的心不太好，要去看医生。
reason: After moving old sentence_3 to sentence_1, provide a new distinct sentence_3. No vocab violation.

new: My heart is not great; I need to see a doctor.
reason: Translation must match revised sentence_3.

new: 他的性格很好。
reason: Unnatural phrasing: 性 alone cannot stand as 'nature' of water. 性 is a morpheme/suffix; it does not appear standalone in natural Chinese this way.

old: The nature of water is special.
new: His character is very good.
reason: Translation must match revised sentence_1.

new: 人的性是很难改变的。
reason: Unnatural phrasing: 这种东西的性很好 is unnatural Chinese. 性 alone as 'nature' needs a more natural framing.

old: The nature of this material is very good.
new: A person's nature is very hard to change.
reason: Translation must match revised sentence_2.

new: 这个人的性很特别。
reason: 他的性很好 is too terse and unnatural. Slightly more natural phrasing.

new: This person's nature is very special.
reason: Translation must match revised sentence_3.

new: 水有流动的性。
reason: 消炎 is not in vocab_upto_L4. Also unnatural use of 性 alone.

new: Water has the property of flowing.
reason: Translation must match revised sentence_1.

new: 这个材料有很硬的性。
reason: 导电 (to conduct electricity) is not in vocab_upto_L4.

old: Iron has the property of conducting electricity.
new: This material has the property of being very hard.
reason: Translation must match revised sentence_2.

new: 这种食物有酸的性。
reason: 硬 is not in vocab_upto_L4. New sentence uses vocab-compliant 酸 (sour, in vocab).

old: This material has the property of being very hard.
new: This type of food has a sour property.
reason: Translation must match revised sentence_3.

new: 她的性格很好，大家都喜欢她。
reason: 开朗 (cheerful/outgoing) is not in vocab_upto_L4.

new: Her temperament is very good; everyone likes her.
reason: Translation must match revised sentence_1.

new: 他的性格有点怪。
reason: 内向 (introverted) is not in vocab_upto_L4.

old: His temperament is a bit introverted.
new: His temperament is a bit strange.
reason: Translation must match revised sentence_2.

new: 他在修树枝。
reason: 指甲 (fingernails) is not in vocab_upto_L4.

new: He is trimming tree branches.
reason: Translation must match revised sentence_1.

old: 科学家对这种病进行了研究。
new: 医生对这种病进行了研究。
reason: 科学家 (scientist) is not in vocab_upto_L4. Replaced with 医生 which is in vocab.

old: Scientists conducted research on this disease.
new: Doctors conducted research on this disease.
reason: Translation must match revised sentence_3.

old: 今晚他们要演一场音乐会。
new: 今晚他们要演一个节目。
reason: 音乐会 (concert) is not in vocab_upto_L4. Replaced with 节目 which is in vocab.

old: They will perform a concert tonight.
new: They will perform a program tonight.
reason: Translation must match revised sentence_3.

new: 这部电影正在电影院演。
reason: 影院 alone is not in vocab_upto_L4; 电影院 is.

old: This film is currently being shown at the cinema.
new: This film is currently being shown at the cinema.
reason: Translation unchanged (meaning identical); sentence corrected to use in-vocab word.

old: 她在音乐会上演唱了三首歌。
new: 她在晚会上演唱了三首歌。
reason: 音乐会 (concert) is not in vocab_upto_L4. Replaced with 晚会 which is in vocab.

old: She sang three songs for the audience at the concert.
new: She sang three songs for the audience at the evening party.
reason: Translation must match revised sentence_1.

new: 孩子们在阳光下跑步。
reason: 玩耍 (to play/frolic) is not in vocab_upto_L4.

old: The children are playing in the sunshine.
new: The children are running in the sunshine.
reason: Translation must match revised sentence_2.

new: 你有什么好意见？
reason: Target word 意见 is absent from sentence_1. Uses 主意 instead, which is a different word.

old: Do you have any good ideas?
new: Do you have any good ideas?
reason: Translation unchanged (meaning the same); sentence corrected to include target word 意见.

new: 她赢得了老师的信任。
reason: Definition for this row is 'to gain', but sentence_3 illustrates winning a competition (same as 赢 definition). Near-duplicate of row 2864 sentence_3 as well. New sentence illustrates 'to gain' (trust/respect).

new: She gained the teacher's trust.
reason: Translation must match revised sentence_3.

old: 她勇敢地说出了心里话。
new: 她勇敢地说出了自己的想法。
reason: 心里话 (words from the heart) is not in vocab_upto_L4 as a compound.

old: She bravely spoke her true feelings.
new: She bravely spoke her own thoughts.
reason: Translation must match revised sentence_2.

new: 这个问题由他来回答。
reason: Near-duplicate of sentence_1 '这件事由他来做' — same structure, only pronoun differs.

old: This matter will be done by me.
new: This question will be answered by him.
reason: Translation must match revised sentence_3.

new: 这个菜很油，不好吃。
reason: 油腻 is not in vocab_upto_L4.

new: This dish is very greasy and not tasty.
reason: Translation must match revised sentence_2.

new: 这个肉很油，我不想吃。
reason: 炸鸡 (fried chicken) is not in vocab_upto_L4.

new: This meat is very greasy; I don't want to eat it.
reason: Translation must match revised sentence_3.

new: 他原谅了她的错误。
reason: 失礼 (rudeness) is not in vocab_upto_L4.

new: He excused her mistake.
reason: Translation must match revised sentence_2.
